top.title: Iranian strike hits near Israeli nuclear facility after Tehran says its site targeted
top.summary: The chief of the International Atomic Energy Agency called for "maximum military restraint" following the strikes.

top.title: Trump at a crossroads as US weighs tough options in Iran
top.summary: Statements from President Trump that the war is almost over are not matching up with the reality on the ground.

top.title: National blackout hits Cuba for second time in a week
top.summary: Another total failure of its power grid underlines Cuba's hardship under a US-imposed fuel blockade.

top.title: Luke Littler applies to trademark his face to combat AI fakes
top.summary: The darts star's image has been used legally on darts merchandise, snacks and fashion brands.

top.title: Hargreaves Lansdown says IT issues which affected thousands are over
top.summary: The finance firm has apologised for the disruption to its website and app, which has angered many customers.

top.title: Publisher cancels horror novel's release over AI claims
top.summary: Author Mia Ballard denies having used AI herself when writing the horror story Shy Girl.
